name: Skyreef Drift
tagline: A luminous sea of clouds and floating reefs above the world.
intro: The wind opens beneath your boots as you step onto a floating platform of pale coral. Far below, the world is a blurred blue sea of clouds, and above you, a ring of glowing leviathan shells drifts through the dawn. A silver gull with lantern-like eyes lands beside you and cries out as if it knows your name. Ahead, a bridge of moonlit mist leads toward a temple carved into a drifting reef, where the air hums with forgotten songs.
